seo.title: SoMa Street Food Night — June 2026 | Metro Little Rock Events
seo.description: Food trucks and pop-up kitchens take over South Main Street for SoMa's monthly street food night. Free admission, great eats, lively atmosphere.

venue_address: S Main St, Little Rock, AR 72202
description: SoMa Street Food Night brings 8–12 food trucks and pop-up vendors onto South Main Street on the third Saturday of the month during summer, filling the corridor with the smell of smoked meats, wood-fired pizza, international street food, and fresh-squeezed limeade. It's a walkable evening where the goal is to sample your way down the block — get two things here, two things there, find a spot on the sidewalk, and let the neighborhood come to you. Lost Forty and Rebel Kettle are steps away for drinks between courses. This is SoMa at its best.
